featuresReviewed.correctness: Table + FK cascade + RLS + trigger + RPC all verified. 20-way parallel at budget=10 proves atomicity of SELECT FOR UPDATE pattern.
featuresReviewed.security: Owner-only SELECT RLS; writes gated by SECURITY DEFINER RPC that only takes p_user_id (no SQL injection surface). Non-negative CHECK constraints on all counter columns.
featuresReviewed.quality: Single migration per concern; idempotent backfill for pre-existing profiles.
featuresReviewed.testing: 9 assertions — happy path, at-budget denial, 20-parallel race, RLS owner/cross-user/anon/service-role, PostgREST write suppression.

featuresReviewed.correctness: Route gates at the owner (not caller), resolves plan limit, calls RPC before any OpenAI work. 402 includes upgrade_url + used/limit.
featuresReviewed.security: Uses the existing service-role client (already required for the widget path). resolveOwnerMessageLimit() narrow reads only plan_id + monthly_message_limit.
featuresReviewed.quality: Helper extracted cleanly; Starter fallback prevents unlimited trial abuse.
featuresReviewed.testing: 5 unit tests including embed() spy for VAL-QUOTA-002 non-invocation assertion.
issues: Widget-side UI for 402 (VAL-QUOTA-011) deferred — API contract complete.

featuresReviewed.correctness: Start gate pre-Firecrawl; webhook processor increments by actual unique page count post-swap.
featuresReviewed.security: checkCrawlQuota runs with the authenticated user's supabase client; plans is public-readable; usage_counters is owner-readable.
featuresReviewed.quality: Increment happens after the atomic swap so failed crawls don't burn quota. Defensive ownerId guard avoids crash on malformed site rows.
featuresReviewed.testing: 5 route tests + 2 process tests. Pre-existing crawl-start/crawl-process suites updated in-place to keep 316 green.
issues: Two-step SELECT/UPDATE increment in process.ts isn't atomic; acceptable because crawl completion is serialized per site. Flagged for M8 audit.

featuresReviewed.correctness: messages_used + crawl_pages_used zeroed; period_start/end rolled; files_stored + openai_tokens_used preserved.
featuresReviewed.security: Webhook path already uses service-role. Event idempotency inherited from M2F3's processed_stripe_events gate.
featuresReviewed.quality: Removed M2-era try/catch workaround cleanly now that the table exists permanently.
featuresReviewed.testing: 3 integration tests — reset values, post-reset RPC recovery, duplicate-event idempotency.

featuresReviewed.correctness: Pure view-model covers empty / normal / overshoot; Realtime subscription uses filtered postgres_changes.
featuresReviewed.security: Client subscription scoped to user_id=eq.X; RLS ensures the user can only receive their own row events.
featuresReviewed.quality: Purity boundary kept clean — subscription lifecycle via useEffect with cleanup.
featuresReviewed.testing: 6 pure-function tests; DOM/Realtime coverage deferred to Playwright.
issues: Plan-change live propagation (VAL-QUOTA-009) relies on window.location.reload() after upgrade today; tighter wiring deferred to M8.

sharedStateUpdates.AGENTS.md: No change — M3 added no new architectural boundary rules.
sharedStateUpdates.libraryFiles: No change — next update lands in M4 settings-sidebar (new routes) or M8 (hardening library).

parallelTestFix: Discovered + fixed during M3F5: test files sharing processed_stripe_events were deleting each other's rows under vitest parallel workers (LIKE 'evt_%'). Namespaced fixture IDs by feature prefix; cleanup patterns now scoped to the file's own prefix. Lesson recorded in M3F5 handoff.

crossMilestoneReconfirms.VAL-BILLING-014: Flipped to passed in M3F4 (M2 did the profile-side rollover; M3F4 added the usage_counters reset).
crossMilestoneReconfirms.VAL-RLS-015: Flipped to passed in M3F1 (deferred from foundation-rls pending usage_counters table creation).

result: PASS — all automated validators green; 3 UI assertions deferred with documented Playwright follow-up.
